---
id: android-keystore-file-confirm
title: "Confirm an android keystore file upload"
description: "This is the last step of uploading an android keystore file to Bitrise. Confirm the android keystore file upload and view the file on the Code Signing tab of a specific app. Read more in our [Confirming the upload](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/managing-files-in-generic-file-storage/#confirming-the-file-upload) guide."
sidebar_label: "Confirm an android keystore file upload"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";
import NT from '@site/src/components/NT';

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Confirm an android keystore file upload"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/android-keystore-files/{android-keystore-file-slug}/uploaded"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This is the last step of uploading an android keystore file to <NT>Bitrise</NT>. Confirm the android keystore file upload and view the file on the <NT>Code Signing</NT> tab of a specific app. Read more in our [Confirming the upload](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/managing-files-in-generic-file-storage/#confirming-the-file-upload) guide.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  {...require("./android-keystore-file-confirm.ParamsDetails.json")}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./android-keystore-file-confirm.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./android-keystore-file-confirm.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
